attributes.action: Call an immediate General Election to let the public choose the future.
attributes.additional_details:
This campaign aims to give people a voice and demonstrate public support for allowing voters to make that decision at the ballot box.
If you support the principle of giving the public the opportunity to choose the next government, we invite you to add your signature and share this message respectfully with others
Your support can help encourage open democratic participation and public engagement across the United Kingdom.
📢 Share with friends
🤝 Encourage respectful discussion and participation
attributes.background: At important moments in national life, democratic accountability and public confidence matter. The country is facing serious challenges that affect families, workers, businesses, and public services across the United Kingdom.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Dissolve Parliament and call a General Election now!
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750050
